commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f82ca98f515a8e5f05360a971c405472498ca873)
commands.review_summary:
The PR appends a README FAQ covering overview, features, installation, requirements, license, and help links.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a README documentation change, and the issue is source-reviewable by comparing the added FAQ text with current README and platform-support docs.
commands.review_followup: A narrow docs repair can preserve the useful FAQ idea by correcting the requirements wording and reducing drift against platform-support.

target.title: docs: Add FAQ section for common questions
target.body:
## Summary

This PR adds a comprehensive FAQ section to the README, covering:

- Project overview and key concepts
- Key features and capabilities  
- Installation and quick start
- Supported platforms/providers
- Use cases
- License information
- Help resources

The FAQ section helps new users quickly understand the project and get started.

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation change only
- [ ] Content is accurate
- [ ] Formatting matches README style

---

**Why this change?** FAQ sections are best practice for open-source projects, reducing onboarding friction and answering common questions proactively.
target.author: meichuanyi

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
